Print method for correlate objects

Source: R/correlate.R
print.correlate.Rd

Print method for correlate objects

Usage

# S3 method for class 'correlate'
print(x, ...)

Arguments

x

An object of class 'correlate'

...

For consistency with the generic (unused)

Value

Invisibly returns the original object
